input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8602 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.sonatype.sisu:sisu-inject-bean:2.4.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The failing compile is an API drift issue: org.eclipse.sisu.space.QualifiedTypeBinder.hear in the resolved 2.4.1 dependency expects the newer two-argument form, so tests copied from 2.4.0 may need source adjustment rather than setup.

The artifact exposes deprecated legacy wrappers and optional test-framework integrations, but meaningful coverage is reachable through core Guice/Sisu classpath-scanning and locator APIs without adding TestNG, OSGi, Docker, environment variables, or system properties.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: sisu-inject-bean is an in-process legacy Sisu/Guice wrapper, and its required runtime APIs resolve through normal Maven transitives plus the TCK scaffold.
